# Neratinib 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Neratinib 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Neratinib</strong> 目前有 <strong>14 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Neratinib 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Nerlynx is indicated for the extended adjuvant treatment of adult patients with early stage hormone receptor positive HER2-overexpressed/amplified breast cancer and who are less than one year from...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（99.8%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（99.7%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（99.7%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（99.7%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（99.7%）</li>
<li>synovium cancer（98.1%）</li>
<li>tenosynovial giant cell tumor（97.4%）</li>
<li>malignant giant cell tumor（96.1%）</li>
<li>tenosynovial giant cell tumor, localized type（95.8%）</li>
<li>fibroblastic neoplasm（95.6%）</li>
<li>kidney fibrosarcoma（95.5%）</li>
<li>conventional fibrosarcoma（95.5%）</li>
<li>benign PEComa（95.4%）</li>
<li>lymphangiomyoma（95.4%）</li>
<li>heart fibrosarcoma（95.3%）</li>
<li>uterine corpus perivascular epithelioid cell tumor（95.3%）</li>
<li>low grade fibromyxoid sarcoma（95.3%）</li>
<li>dermatofibrosarcoma protuberans（95.1%）</li>
<li>cutaneous undifferentiated pleomorphic sarcoma（94.7%）</li>
<li>malignant tenosynovial giant cell tumor（94.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/neratinib/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
